task: Author index.html, main.js, and styles.css; bootstrap data fetch + map mount; render legend; show error banner on failure.

S3.A2: #map has flex:1 + min-height:600px; on a 1280x800 viewport (header ~52px, banner hidden) the map covers > 50% of viewport area.
S3.A3: legend renders 5 buckets with color+size swatches generated from EarthquakeMap style functions.
S3.A4: showError() unhides #error-banner with a human-readable message; bootstrap reports section-1 errors here.
S3.A5: viewport meta width=1280, no mobile-only nav, desktop proportions.
TDIP3.A3: legend present and labels magnitude buckets.
DC.A2 / DC.A10: map is the dominant region; layout is desktop-typical.
